headline: A Look At Raymond James Financial (RJF) Valuation After Recent Share Price Momentum
summary: Why Raymond James Financial (RJF) Is On Investors’ Radar Today Raymond James Financial (RJF) is drawing fresh attention after recent share price moves, with the stock showing a 1 day return of 1.8% and a past month return of 9.3%. See our latest analysis for Raymond James Financial. That short term strength, including a 9.3% 30 day share price return after some recent softness, sits alongside a 16.5% 1 year total shareholder return and very strong 3 and 5 year total shareholder returns. headline: Raymond James Lifts Amazon Price Target to $280 on AI Partnerships: Is AWS Still the Stealth AI Winner?
summary: Raymond James lifted its price target on Amazon (NASDAQ:AMZN) stock to $280 from $225, maintaining its Outperform rating. The firm argues that major artificial intelligence (AI) partnerships and expanding agentic capabilities are reinforcing Amazon Web Services (AWS) as the key platform for enterprise and consumer AI commercialization. For long-term investors, the revised outlook warrants a ... Raymond James Lifts Amazon Price Target to $280 on AI Partnerships: Is AWS Still the Stealth AI Winner
